description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Wind Knows My Name" by Isabel Allende. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Barnes & Noble. Refreshments served.

title: Book Discussion: The Ocean at the End of the Lane
bookTitle: The Ocean at the End of the Lane
author: Neil Gaiman
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Ocean at the End of the Lane" by Neil Gaiman. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Third Place Books (Seward Park) Bookstore. Refreshments served.

title: Author Signing: Leigh Bardugo
author: Leigh Bardugo
description: Join us at Barnes & Noble for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Leigh Bardugo, celebrating their work, including "The Familiar". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Author Signing: James Clear
author: James Clear
description: Join us at Barnes & Noble for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author James Clear, celebrating their work, including "Atomic Habits". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Creative Writing Workshop with David Grann
author: David Grann
description: Unlock your writing potential in this interactive workshop led by acclaimed author David Grann. Inspired by the techniques used in "The Wager", we will explore character development, world-building, and pacing. Limited seats available, reservation recommended.

author: James McBride
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Heaven & Earth Grocery Store" by James McBride. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Politics and Prose Bookstore. Refreshments served.
